---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem would this solve? What are you trying to do that's hard or
impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it maps to something in [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md),
link it.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one is better.

## Additional context

Anything else — examples, references, or how it fits departai's focus
(a deterministic, standalone 2-agent relay).
